name: brainstorm-mcp
description: MCP server for multi-model AI brainstorming, code review, and quick perspectives. No API keys needed in hosted mode.
long_description:
brainstorm-mcp lets your AI assistant orchestrate structured debates between multiple LLMs. Ask Claude to brainstorm a topic, and it runs a multi-round debate across GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible model.

**Key features:**
- **Hosted mode** — No API keys needed. Uses models available in your environment (Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, GPT, Gemini) via sub-agents.
- **API mode** — Direct model API calls with parallel execution.
- **brainstorm_quick** — Instant multi-model perspectives in under 10 seconds.
- **brainstorm_review** — Multi-model code review with structured findings, severity ratings, and verdicts.
- **Debate styles** — Freeform, red-team (adversarial), and Socratic (probing questions).
- **Context injection** — Ground debates in actual code, diffs, or docs.
- **3-bullet synthesis verdicts** — Recommendation, Key Tradeoffs, Strongest Disagreement.
- Multi-round debates with cross-model critique.
- Resilient — one model failing doesn't abort the debate.
- Works with any OpenAI-compatible API (including local Ollama).
